entity.label: Meraiah

entity.description: Resistance, a chief priest, a contemporary of the high priest Joiakim (Neh. 12:12).

nodes.label: Meraiah
nodes.description: Resistance, a chief priest, a contemporary of the high priest Joiakim (Neh. 12:12).

verses.text: And in the days of Joiakim were priests, the chief of the fathers: of Seraiah, Meraiah; of Jeremiah, Hananiah;
